summary: Added smooth transitions and hover border to page numbers, restored transparent border to prevent layout shift, adjusted current page gradient bar positioning to account for border
userRevisions: Ensure smooth transitions on page numbers (transition-all already present)
Add black border on hover for visual emphasis
Add transparent border by default to prevent layout shift
Adjust .current::after bottom position to account for 2px border height

changes.description: Restored transparent border to reserve space and prevent 1px layout shift on hover
Added visible black border on hover for visual emphasis with gradient background
Adjusted by +2px to account for top+bottom borders (1px each) that change total element height

transitionSmooth.effect: Animates background, border-color, and other property changes smoothly
transitionSmooth.note: No additional transition needed - transition-all covers all properties

transparentBorder.purpose: Prevent layout shift when border appears on hover
transparentBorder.mechanism: Transparent border reserves 1px space on all sides (2px total height: top+bottom), hover just changes color not dimensions

currentAfterAdjustment.problem: Adding 1px border on top and bottom adds 2px to total element height
currentAfterAdjustment.effect: Gradient bar now aligns exactly on top of gray bar despite border presence

layoutShiftPrevention.issue: Adding border on hover without default border causes 1px shift in all directions
layoutShiftPrevention.solution: Always reserve border space with transparent border, only change color on hover

boxModel.withTransparentBorder: 40x40px content + 2px border (1px each side) = 42x42px total box, but visually 40x40
boxModel.result: Box size stays constant, only border visibility/color changes

layoutShiftPrevention.note: transition-all ensures smooth color change from transparent to charcoal

reasoning: Gray bar is at bottom: 0 of nav-links (12px from bottom of visible items due to pb-3)
Current item now has 2px border adding to its height
To align gradient bar with gray bar: 12px padding - 2px border = -10px offset
Negative offset positions ::after below element, -10px puts it exactly at gray bar level

current.barBelow: gradient at bottom: -10px (aligned with gray bar)

visualEffect.onHover: Gradient background fades in, black border fades in from transparent
visualEffect.noLayoutShift: Element stays in exact same position

verification.accessibility: maintained (ARIA attributes, keyboard support, screen reader announcements)
verification.visualIntegrity: smooth hover transitions, no layout shift, gradient bar aligned with gray bar
